\"Jo+í otvoren\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Status</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.Status</dd>\n-    <dt>Kilometra++a pri servisu</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.KilometrazaPrilikomServisa.ToString(\"N0\") km</dd>\n-    <dt>Opis radova</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.OpisRadova</dd>\n-    <dt>Napomena</dt>\n-    <dd>@(Model.Napomena ?? \"-\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Sljede-çi preporu-ìeni pregled</dt>\n-    <dd>@(Model.SljedecaPreporucenaPregleda?.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\") ?? \"-\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Ukupna cijena</dt>\n-    <dd><strong>@Model.UkupnaCijena.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</strong></dd>\n-</dl>\n-\n-@if (Model.Stavke != null && Model.Stavke.Any())\n-{\n-    <h4>Ugra-æeni dijelovi</h4>\n-    <table class=\"table\">\n-        <thead>\n-            <tr>\n-                <th>Dio</th>\n-                <th>Koli-ìina</th>\n-                <th>Cijena/kom</th>\n-                <th>Ukupno</th>\n-                <th>Napomena</th>\n-            </tr>\n-        </thead>\n-        <tbody>\n-            @foreach (var stavka in Model.Stavke)\n-            {\n-                <tr>\n-                    <td>@(stavka.Dio?.Naziv ?? $\"Dio #{stavka.DioId}\")</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.Kolicina</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.CijenaKomad.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.UkupnaCijenaStavke.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</td>\n-                    <td>@(stavka.Napomena ?? \"-\")</td>\n-                </tr>\n-            }\n-        </tbody>\n-    </table>\n-}\n+<section class=\"entity-shell\">\n+    <div class=\"entity-head\">\n+        <h2>Servisni nalog #@Model.Id</h2>\n+    </div>\n+\n+    <div class=\"detail-card mb-4\">\n+        <dl class=\"row mb-0\">\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Vozilo</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">\n+                @if (Model.Automobil != null)\n+                {\n+                    <a asp-controller=\"Automobil\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@Model.AutomobilId\">@Model.Automobil.Naziv</a>\n+                }\n+            </dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Mehani-ìar</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">\n+                @if (Model.Mehanicar != null)\n+                {\n+                    <a asp-controller=\"Mehanicar\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@Model.MehanicarId\">@Model.Mehanicar.PunoIme</a>\n+                }\n+            </dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Datum otvaranja</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@Model.DatumOtvaranja.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\")</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Datum zatvaranja</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@(Model.DatumZatvaranja?.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\") ?? \"Jo+í otvoren\")</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Status</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@Model.Status</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Kilometra++a pri servisu</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@Model.KilometrazaPrilikomServisa.ToString(\"N0\") km</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Opis radova</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@Model.OpisRadova</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Napomena</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@(Model.Napomena ?? {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:51:11.666Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\OdrzavanjeVozila\\OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext.cs","content":"using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing OdrzavanjeVozila.Klase;\n\nnamespace OdrzavanjeVozila\n{\n    public class OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext : DbContext\n    {\n        public OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext() { }\n\n        public OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext(DbContextOptions<OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext> options) \n            : base(options)\n        {\n        }\n\n        // DbSets for all entities\n        public DbSet<Korisnik> Korisnici { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Automobil> Automobili { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Radionica> Radionice { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Mehanicar> Mehanicari { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<ServisniNalog> ServisniNalozi { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<NalogStavka> NalogStavke { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Dio> Dijelovi { get; set; }\n\n        protected override void OnConfiguring(DbContextOptionsBuilder optionsBuilder)\n        {\n            if (!optionsBuilder.IsConfigured)\n            {\n                // Default configuration if not provided via DI\n                optionsBuilder.UseSqlServer(\"Server=(localdb)\\\\mssqllocaldb;Database=OdrzavanjeVozila;Trusted_Connection=true;\");\n            }\n            base.OnConfiguring(optionsBuilder);\n        }\n\n        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n        {\n            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n            // Configure relationships explicitly if needed\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Automobil>()\n                .HasOne(a => a.Korisnik)\n                .WithMany(k => k.Vozila)\n                .HasForeignKey(a => a.KorisnikId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<ServisniNalog>()\n                .HasOne(sn => sn.Automobil)\n                .WithMany(a => a.ServisniNalozi)\n                .HasForeignKey(sn => sn.AutomobilId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<ServisniNalog>()\n                .HasOne(sn => sn.Mehanicar)\n                .WithMany(m => m.Nalozi)\n                .HasForeignKey(sn => sn.MehanicarId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Restrict);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Mehanicar>()\n                .HasOne(m => m.Radionica)\n                .WithMany(r => r.Mehanicari)\n                .HasForeignKey(m => m.RadionicaId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Restrict);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<NalogStavka>()\n                .HasOne(ns => ns.Nalog)\n                .WithMany(sn => sn.Stavke)\n                .HasForeignKey(ns => ns.NalogId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<NalogStavka>()\n                .HasOne(ns => ns.Dio)\n                .WithMany(d => d.Stavke)\n                .HasForeignKey(ns => ns.DioId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Restrict);\n\n            // Seed initial data\n            SeedInitialData(modelBuilder);\n        }\n\n        private void SeedInitialData(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n        {\n            // Seed Radionice\n {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:51:42.537Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\OdrzavanjeVozila\\Program.cs","newString":"using OdrzavanjeVozila;\nusing OdrzavanjeVozila.Repositories;\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\n// Add services to the container.\nbuilder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n\n// Register DbContext with SQL Server\nbuilder.Services.AddDbContext<OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext>(options =>\n    options.UseSqlServer(\n        builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString(\"OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext\")));\n\n// Keep mock repositories for now (will be replaced with EF repositories later)\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<KorisnikMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<AutomobilMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MehanicarMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<RadionicaMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<DioMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<ServisniNalogMockRepository>();\n\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\n// Configure the HTTP request pipeline.\nif (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n{\n    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n    // The default HSTS value is 30 days. You may want to change this for production scenarios, see https://aka.ms/aspnetcore-hsts.\n    app.UseHsts();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\napp.UseStaticFiles();\n\napp.UseRouting();\n\napp.UseAuthorization();\n\n// Custom routes (attribute routing on controllers take precedence)\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"vozila_by_korisnik\",\n    pattern: \"vozila/korisnika/{korisnikId:int}\",\n    defaults: new { controller = \"Automobil\", action = \"PoBenzinskoj\" });\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"servisi_status\",\n    pattern: \"servisi/status/{status}\",\n    defaults: new { controller = \"ServisniNalog\", action = \"PriStatusu\" });\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"dijelovi_kategorija\",\n    pattern: \"dijelovi/kategorija/{kategorija}\",\n    defaults: new { controller = \"Dio\", action = \"PrioCategory\" });\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"mehanicari_radionica\",\n    pattern: \"mehanicari/radionica/{radionicaId:int}\",\n    defaults: new { controller = \"Mehanicar\", action = \"PorRadionica\" });\n\n// Default route\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"default\",\n    pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n\napp.Run();","oldString":"using OdrzavanjeVozila.Repositories;\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\n// Add services to the container.\nbuilder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<KorisnikMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<AutomobilMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<MehanicarMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<RadionicaMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<DioMockRepository>();\nbuilder.Services.AddSingleton<ServisniNalogMockRepository>();\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\n// Configure the HTTP request pipeline.\nif (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n{\n    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n    // The default HSTS value is 30 days. You may want to change this for production scenarios, see https://aka.ms/aspnetcore-hsts.\n    app.UseHsts();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\napp.UseStaticFiles();\n\napp.UseRouting();\n\napp.UseAuthorization();\n\napp.MapControllerRoute(\n    name: \"default\",\n    pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n\napp.Run();"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_017XMqeuoSshrctRmXD4bpXn__vscode-1778089613412","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}

Sastoji se od sljede-çih entiteta (klasa/tablica):\n\n### 1. **Korisnik** (Users)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Ime (string)\n  - Prezime (string)\n  - Email (string)\n  - Telefon (string)\n  - Adresa (string)\n  - DatumRegistracije (DateTime)\n- **Veze:** 1-N s tablicom **Automobil**\n\n### 2. **Automobil** (Cars)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Strani klju-ì:** KorisnikId GåÆ Korisnik.Id\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Marka (string)\n  - Model (string)\n  - Godiste (int)\n  - RegistracijskiBroj (string)\n  - BrojSasije (string)\n  - TrenutnaKilometraza (int)\n  - VrstaPogona (enum: Benzin, Diesel, Hybrid, Elektricni)\n  - DatumPrvogServisa (DateTime)\n- **Veze:**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **Korisnik**\n  - 1-N s tablicom **ServisniNalog**\n\n### 3. **Radionica** (Workshops)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Naziv (string)\n  - Adresa (string)\n  - Telefon (string)\n  - Email (string)\n- **Veze:** 1-N s tablicom **Mehanicar**\n\n### 4. **Mehanicar** (Mechanics)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Strani klju-ìevi:**\n  - RadionicaId GåÆ Radionica.Id\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Ime (string)\n  - Prezime (string)\n  - Specijalizacija (string)\n  - DatumZaposlenja (DateTime)\n  - SatnicaEUR (decimal)\n- **Veze:**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **Radionica**\n  - 1-N s tablicom **ServisniNalog**\n\n### 5. **ServisniNalog** (Service Orders)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Strani klju-ìevi:**\n  - AutomobilId GåÆ Automobil.Id\n  - MehanicarId GåÆ Mehanicar.Id\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - DatumOtvaranja (DateTime)\n  - DatumZatvaranja (DateTime?, nullable)\n  - SljedecaPreporucenaPregleda (DateTime?, nullable)\n  - OpisRadova (string)\n  - UkupnaCijena (decimal)\n  - Status (enum: Otvoren, URedu, Zatvoren)\n  - KilometrazaPrilikomServisa (int)\n  - Napomena (string)\n- **Veze:**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **Automobil**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **Mehanicar**\n  - 1-N s tablicom **NalogStavka**\n\n### 6. **NalogStavka** (Service Order Items)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Strani klju-ìevi:**\n  - NalogId GåÆ ServisniNalog.Id\n  - DioId GåÆ Dio.Id\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Kolicina (int)\n  - CijenaKomad (decimal)\n  - Napomena (string)\n  - UkupnaCijenaStavke (computed: Kolicina * CijenaKomad)\n- **Veze:**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **ServisniNalog**\n  - N-1 s tablicom **Dio**\n\n### 7. **Dio** (Parts/Components)\n- **Primarni klju-ì:** Id (int)\n- **Svojstva:**\n  - Naziv (string)\n  - KatalogBroj (string)\n  - Proizvodac (string)\n  - Cijena (decimal)\n  - Kategorija (enum: Filtri, Tekucine, RemeniIKaisle, Kocnice, Ostalo)\n  - KolicinaNaSkladistu (int)\n  - Opis (string)\n- **Veze:** 1-N s tablicom **NalogStavka**\n\n## Dijagram veza izme-æu tablica\n\n```\nKorisnik (1) GöÇGöÇGöÇ (N) Automobil\n                         Göé\n                         GööGöÇ (1) GöÇGöÇGöÇ (N) ServisniNalog GöÇGöÇGöÇ (1) GöÇGöÇGöÇ (N) NalogStavka GöÇGöÇGöÇ (N) Dio\n                                          Göé\n                                          GööGöÇ (N) GöÇGöÇGöÇ (1) Mehanicar GöÇGöÇGöÇ (N) Radionica\n```\n\n## Tipovi podataka i enumeracije\n\n### VrstaPogona\n- Benzin\n- Diesel\n- Hybrid\n- Elektricni\n\n### StatusNaloga\n- Otvoren\n- URedu\n- Zatvoren\n\n### KategorijaDijela\n- Filtri\n- Tekucine\n- RemeniIKaisle\n- Kocnice\n- Ostalo\n\n## Pravila brisanja (Delete Behaviors)\n\n- **Automobil**: Kaskadno brisanje kod korisnika (ako korisnik bude obrisan, obrisu se i njegovi automobili)\n- **ServisniNalog**: Kaskadno brisanje kod automobila, ograni-ìeno brisanje kod mehani-ìara\n- **NalogStavka**: Kaskadno brisanje kod naloga, ograni-ìeno brisanje kod dijelova\n- **Mehanicar**: Ograni-ìeno brisanje kod radnice (ne mo++e se obrisati radionica ako ima mehani-ìara)\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01EbPLAR7tmjTUDQaUE9irLm__vscode-1778089613414","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}

Sitemap - Routing Model Aplikacije OdrzavanjeVozila\n\nOvaj dokument dokumentira sve dostupne URL-ove u aplikaciji, te nazna-ìuje koji je controller, koja akcija i koji view-ovi se koriste.\n\n## Standardne rute (default routing)\n\n### Home Controller\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/` | Home | Index | Views/Home/Index.cshtml |\n| `/home` | Home | Index | Views/Home/Index.cshtml |\n| `/home/Index` | Home | Index | Views/Home/Index.cshtml |\n| `/home/privacy` | Home | Privacy | Views/Home/Privacy.cshtml |\n\n### Korisnik Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/Korisnik` | Korisnik | Index | Views/Korisnik/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Korisnik/Index` | Korisnik | Index | Views/Korisnik/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Korisnik/Details/1` | Korisnik | Details | Views/Korisnik/Details.cshtml |\n\n### Automobil Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/Automobil` | Automobil | Index | Views/Automobil/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Automobil/Index` | Automobil | Index | Views/Automobil/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Automobil/Details/1` | Automobil | Details | Views/Automobil/Details.cshtml |\n\n### Mehanicar Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/Mehanicar` | Mehanicar | Index | Views/Mehanicar/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Mehanicar/Index` | Mehanicar | Index | Views/Mehanicar/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Mehanicar/Details/1` | Mehanicar | Details | Views/Mehanicar/Details.cshtml |\n\n### Radionica Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/Radionica` | Radionica | Index | Views/Radionica/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Radionica/Index` | Radionica | Index | Views/Radionica/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Radionica/Details/1` | Radionica | Details | Views/Radionica/Details.cshtml |\n\n### Dio Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/Dio` | Dio | Index | Views/Dio/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Dio/Index` | Dio | Index | Views/Dio/Index.cshtml |\n| `/Dio/Details/1` | Dio | Details | Views/Dio/Details.cshtml |\n\n### ServisniNalog Controller (Default routing)\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View |\n|-----|-----------|--------|------|\n| `/ServisniNalog` | ServisniNalog | Index | Views/ServisniNalog/Index.cshtml |\n| `/ServisniNalog/Index` | ServisniNalog | Index | Views/ServisniNalog/Index.cshtml |\n| `/ServisniNalog/Details/1` | ServisniNalog | Details | Views/ServisniNalog/Details.cshtml |\n\n---\n\n## CUSTOM RUTE (Implementirane u Program.cs)\n\n### Custom Route 1: Vozila po korisniku\n```\nPattern: /vozila/korisnika/{korisnikId:int}\nController: Automobil\nAkcija: PoBenzinskoj\nOpis: Prikazuje automobila specifi-ìnog korisnika\nPrimjer: /vozila/korisnika/1\n```\n\n### Custom Route 2: Servisi po statusu\n```\nPattern: /servisi/status/{status}\nController: ServisniNalog\nAkcija: PriStatusu\nOpis: Prikazuje servisne naloge filtriranog po statusu\nPrimjer: /servisi/status/Otvoren\n```\n\n### Custom Route 3: Dijelovi po kategoriji\n```\nPattern: /dijelovi/kategorija/{kategorija}\nController: Dio\nAkcija: PrioCategory\nOpis: Prikazuje dijelove filtriranog po kategoriji\nPrimjer: /dijelovi/kategorija/Filtri\n```\n\n### Custom Route 4: Mehani-ìari po radionici\n```\nPattern: /mehanicari/radionica/{radionicaId:int}\nController: Mehanicar\nAkcija: PorRadionica\nOpis: Prikazuje mehani-ìare specifi-ìne radoce\nPrimjer: /mehanicari/radionica/1\n```\n\n---\n\n## Attribute Routing (Ako budu implementirane na controllerima)\n\nZahtjevi za Lab 3 tako-æer omogu-çuju kori+ítenje Attribute Routing direktno na controller akcijama, gdje se koristi `[Route]` atribut umjesto `MapControllerRoute` u `Program.cs`.\n\nPrimjer Attribute Routinga:\n```csharp\n[Route(\"auto\")]\npublic class AutomobilController : Controller\n{\n    [Route(\"lista\")]\n    public IActionResult Index() { ... }\n    \n    [Route(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public IActionResult Details(int id) { ... }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Redoslijed evaluacije ruta\n\n1. **Attribute routes** - provjeravaju se prvi\n2. **Custom routes** - provjeravaju se redoslijedo kako su definirane u `Program.cs`\n3. **Default route** - fallback ako nijedna druga ruta nije odgovaraju-ça\n\n---\n\n## Bilje+íke\n\n- Svi ID-evi u rutama trebaju biti cijeli brojevi (`:int`)\n- Ako ID nije uklju-ìen u URL-u, defaultna vrijednost je null (opcionalno)\n- Status i kategorija parametri u custom rutama trebaju biti stringovi koji odgovaraju enumeracijama\n- Za potpuni CRUD sustav trebaju se implementirati akcije: Create, Edit, Delete (nisu jo+í sve dokumentirane)\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\OdrzavanjeVozila\\sitemap.md"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01J4RGW7rhsdWQhbGzhwMxQj__vscode-1778089613415","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:52:36.692Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"---\nname: EF Skill\ndescription: |\n  This skill helps with Entity Framework (EF Core) tasks in the OdrzavanjeVozila project.\n  Use this skill when you need to:\n  - Add new EF model classes with proper annotations\n  - Generate migrations\n  - Update the database\n  - Configure relationships between entities\n  - Add data seeding\n\napplyTo: \"**/*.cs\"\n---\n\nYou are an Entity Framework expert. Your role is to help with EF Core development tasks.\n\n## Key responsibilities\n\n1. **Add Model Classes**: Create new entity classes with:\n   - `[Key]` attribute on primary keys (Id)\n   - `[ForeignKey]` attributes on foreign key properties\n   - `virtual` navigation properties\n   - `ICollection<T>` for one-to-many relationships\n   - Proper DataAnnotations for validation\n\n2. **Configure DbContext**: \n   - Add new `DbSet<T>` properties for each entity\n   - Configure relationships in `OnModelCreating`\n   - Set up delete behaviors (Cascade, Restrict, SetNull)\n   - Add seed data via `HasData()` and `OnModelCreating()`\n\n3. **Generate Migrations**:\n   - After any model changes, run: `dotnet ef migrations add {MigrationName} --startup-project OdrzavanjeVozila --context OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext`\n   - Review generated migration files\n\n4. **Update Database**:\n   - Run: `dotnet ef database update --startup-project OdrzavanjeVozila --context OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext`\n\n## Project context\n\n- **DbContext**: `OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext` located in `OdrzavanjeVozila/OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext.cs`\n- **Models folder**: `OdrzavanjeVozila/Klase/`\n- **Connection string**: Configured in `appsettings.json` as `OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext`\n- **Database**: SQL Server (localdb)\n\n## Example model with proper EF annotations\n\n```csharp\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;\n\nnamespace OdrzavanjeVozila.Klase\n{\n    public class ExampleEntity\n    {\n        [Key]\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        \n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        \n        // Foreign key\n        public int ParentEntityId { get; set; }\n        public virtual ParentEntity ParentEntity { get; set; }\n        \n        // One-to-many relationship\n        public virtual ICollection<ChildEntity> Children { get; set; }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## Workflow\n\n1. User requests: \"Add a new entity class X\"\n2. Create the class with proper EF annotations\n3. Add DbSet<X> to OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext\n4. Configure relationships if needed\n5. Generate migration\n6. Offer to apply the migration\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\.github\\agents\\EF_Skill.md"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01BxDn9JnfEAYnP1smmPHvbm__vscode-1778089613416","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:52:50.089Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"---\nname: List Page Skill\ndescription: |\n  This skill helps create modern list/index pages for the OdrzavanjeVozila application.\n  Use this skill when you need to:\n  - Create a new list (Index) view\n  - Display entities in a table, grid, or card layout\n  - Add filtering, sorting, or searching capabilities\n  - Implement pagination\n  - Add action buttons (Edit, Delete, Details)\n  - Use responsive Bootstrap design\n\napplyTo: \"**/Views/**/*.cshtml\"\n---\n\nYou are a Razor/ASP.NET MVC View expert. Your role is to create beautiful, functional list/index pages.\n\n## Key responsibilities\n\n1. **Create Index Views**: Build modern list pages that:\n   - Display data in a responsive table or card grid\n   - Include breadcrumbs for navigation\n   - Show action buttons (Edit, Delete, Details)\n   - Use Bootstrap 5 for styling\n   - Include filtering/searching UI if needed\n   - Add a \"Create New\" button\n   - Display \"No data\" message if list is empty\n\n2. **Styling**: \n   - Use Bootstrap 5 utilities\n   - Custom CSS in `wwwroot/css/site.css`\n   - Responsive design (works on mobile)\n   - Professional color scheme\n\n3. **Data Binding**:\n   - Use `@Model` to iterate through collections\n   - Use `@Html.ActionLink()` or `<a asp-*>` tag helpers for navigation\n   - Display formatted dates and currency values\n   - Show related entity information\n\n4. **Features**:\n   - Search/filter functionality\n   - Sort columns\n   - Pagination (if many items)\n   - Status badges\n   - Quick action buttons\n\n## Project context\n\n- **Views location**: `OdrzavanjeVozila/Views/{Controller}/`\n- **Layout**: `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n- **CSS**: `wwwroot/css/site.css`\n- **Bootstrap version**: Bootstrap 5\n\n## Example structure for Index view\n\n```razor\n@model List<OdrzavanjeVozila.Klase.EntityName>\n\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Entity List\";\n}\n\n<!-- Breadcrumb -->\n<nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\">\n    <ol class=\"breadcrumb\">\n        <li class=\"breadcrumb-item\"><a href=\"/\">Home</a></li>\n        <li class=\"breadcrumb-item active\">Entities</li>\n    </ol>\n</nav>\n\n<!-- Header with Create button -->\n<div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4\">\n    <h1>@ViewData[\"Title\"]</h1>\n    <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Create\")\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">+ New Entity</a>\n</div>\n\n<!-- Search/Filter Section (optional) -->\n<div class=\"card mb-4\">\n    <div class=\"card-body\">\n        <!-- Filter form here -->\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- Table/Grid Display -->\n@if (Model.Count > 0)\n{\n    <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n            <table class=\"table table-hover mb-0\">\n                <thead class=\"table-light\">\n                    <tr>\n                        <th>Column 1</th>\n                        <th>Column 2</th>\n                        <th>Column 3</th>\n                        <th>Actions</th>\n                    </tr>\n                </thead>\n                <tbody>\n                    @foreach (var item in Model)\n                    {\n                        <tr>\n                            <td>@item.Property1</td>\n                            <td>@item.Property2</td>\n                            <td>@item.Property3</td>\n                            <td>\n                                <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Details\", new { id = item.Id })\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-info\">Details</a>\n                                <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Edit\", new { id = item.Id })\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-warning\">Edit</a>\n                                <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Delete\", new { id = item.Id })\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-danger\">Delete</a>\n                            </td>\n                        </tr>\n                    }\n                </tbody>\n            </table>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n}\nelse\n{\n    <div class=\"alert alert-info\">\n        No entities found. <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Create\")\">Create one now</a>\n    </div>\n}\n```\n\n## Design principles\n\n1. **Header**: Clear page title and context\n2. **Actions**: Prominent \"Create\" button\n3. **Data display**: Clean, scannable table or cards\n4. **Responsive**: Works on all screen sizes\n5. **Accessibility**: Semantic HTML, good contrast\n6. **Navigation**: Breadcrumbs and clear links\n\n## Workflow\n\n1. User requests: \"Create list page for X\"\n2. Determine the best layout (table, cards, grid)\n3. Create the view with proper Razor syntax\n4. Add Bootstrap styling\n5. Implement action buttons\n6. Test responsiveness\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\.github\\agents\\ListPage_Skill.md"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01DPFE58dSo5ZvUJgkQKjQmD__vscode-1778089613417","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:53:08.245Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"---\nname: Edit Form Skill\ndescription: |\n  This skill helps create modern edit/create forms for the OdrzavanjeVozila application.\n  Use this skill when you need to:\n  - Create a new edit (Edit/Create) view\n  - Build a form with proper validation\n  - Display form fields for entity properties\n  - Handle dropdowns for foreign keys\n  - Implement image/file uploads (if applicable)\n  - Add form submission and error handling\n  - Use responsive Bootstrap design\n\napplyTo: \"**/Views/**/*.cshtml\"\n---\n\nYou are a Razor/ASP.NET MVC Form expert. Your role is to create professional, user-friendly edit/create forms.\n\n## Key responsibilities\n\n1. **Create Edit/Create Views**: Build modern forms that:\n   - Display all editable entity properties\n   - Include breadcrumbs for navigation\n   - Show validation error messages\n   - Use Bootstrap 5 form styling\n   - Include dropdown menus for foreign keys\n   - Have Submit and Cancel buttons\n   - Support both Create (POST) and Edit (PUT) modes\n   - Show read-only properties where appropriate\n\n2. **Form Elements**:\n   - Text inputs for strings\n   - Number inputs for decimal/int\n   - Datetime pickers for dates\n   - Select dropdowns for enums and relationships\n   - Textarea for long text\n   - Checkboxes for booleans\n   - Hidden fields for IDs\n\n3. **Validation**:\n   - Display validation errors from ModelState\n   - Use HTML5 validation attributes\n   - Show required fields\n   - Client-side validation hints\n\n4. **Styling**: \n   - Use Bootstrap 5 form classes\n   - Group related fields\n   - Proper spacing and layout\n   - Responsive on mobile\n   - Clear visual hierarchy\n\n## Project context\n\n- **Views location**: `OdrzavanjeVozila/Views/{Controller}/`\n- **Layout**: `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n- **CSS**: `wwwroot/css/site.css`\n- **Bootstrap version**: Bootstrap 5\n- **Tag Helpers**: Use `asp-for`, `asp-action`, `asp-controller`, `asp-route-*`\n\n## Example structure for Edit view\n\n```razor\n@model OdrzavanjeVozila.Klase.EntityName\n\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = Model.Id == 0 ? \"Create Entity\" : \"Edit Entity\";\n}\n\n<!-- Breadcrumb -->\n<nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\">\n    <ol class=\"breadcrumb\">\n        <li class=\"breadcrumb-item\"><a href=\"/\">Home</a></li>\n        <li class=\"breadcrumb-item\"><a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Index\")\">Entities</a></li>\n        <li class=\"breadcrumb-item active\">@ViewData[\"Title\"]</li>\n    </ol>\n</nav>\n\n<!-- Header -->\n<div class=\"mb-4\">\n    <h1>@ViewData[\"Title\"]</h1>\n</div>\n\n<!-- Form -->\n<div class=\"row\">\n    <div class=\"col-md-8\">\n        <div class=\"card\">\n            <div class=\"card-body\">\n                @using (Html.BeginForm(\"Save\", \"EntityName\", FormMethod.Post))\n                {\n                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                    \n                    <!-- Hidden ID field -->\n                    @Html.HiddenFor(model => model.Id)\n                    \n                    <!-- Display validation summary -->\n                    <div asp-validation-summary=\"ModelOnly\" class=\"alert alert-danger\"></div>\n                    \n                    <!-- Form Groups -->\n                    <div class=\"mb-3\">\n                        <label asp-for=\"PropertyName\" class=\"form-label\">Property Name</label>\n                        <input asp-for=\"PropertyName\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder=\"Enter value\" />\n                        <span asp-validation-for=\"PropertyName\" class=\"text-danger\"></span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"mb-3\">\n                        <label asp-for=\"DateProperty\" class=\"form-label\">Date Property</label>\n                        <input asp-for=\"DateProperty\" type=\"datetime-local\" class=\"form-control\" />\n                        <span asp-validation-for=\"DateProperty\" class=\"text-danger\"></span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"mb-3\">\n                        <label asp-for=\"EnumProperty\" class=\"form-label\">Category</label>\n                        <select asp-for=\"EnumProperty\" class=\"form-select\">\n                            <option value=\"\">-- Select --</option>\n                            <option value=\"Value1\">Value 1</option>\n                            <option value=\"Value2\">Value 2</option>\n                        </select>\n                        <span asp-validation-for=\"EnumProperty\" class=\"text-danger\"></span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"mb-3\">\n                        <label asp-for=\"ForeignKeyId\" class=\"form-label\">Related Entity</label>\n                        <select asp-for=\"ForeignKeyId\" asp-items=\"ViewBag.ForeignKeyOptions\" class=\"form-select\">\n                            <option value=\"\">-- Select --</option>\n                        </select>\n                        <span asp-validation-for=\"ForeignKeyId\" class=\"text-danger\"></span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"mb-3\">\n                        <label asp-for=\"Description\" class=\"form-label\">Description</label>\n                        <textarea asp-for=\"Description\" class=\"form-control\" rows=\"4\"></textarea>\n                        <span asp-validation-for=\"Description\" class=\"text-danger\"></span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <!-- Form Actions -->\n                    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\n                        <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">\n                            @(Model.Id == 0 ? \"Create\" : \"Update\")\n                        </button>\n                        <a href=\"@Url.Action(\"Index\")\" class=\"btn btn-secondary\">Cancel</a>\n                    </div>\n                }\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- JavaScript for client-side validation -->\n@section Scripts {\n    @{\n        await Html.RenderPartialAsync(\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\");\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## Controller Actions Pattern\n\n```csharp\n// GET: Create/Edit form\npublic IActionResult Edit(int? id)\n{\n    if (id.HasValue)\n    {\n        var entity = _context.Entities.Find(id);\n        if (entity == null) return NotFound();\n        \n        // Load foreign key options\n        ViewBag.ForeignKeyOptions = new SelectList(\n            _context.RelatedEntities, \"Id\", \"Name\");\n        \n        return View(entity);\n    }\n    \n    // For create: populate dropdown options\n    ViewBag.ForeignKeyOptions = new SelectList(\n        _context.RelatedEntities, \"Id\", \"Name\");\n    \n    return View(new Entity());\n}\n\n// POST: Save (Create or Update)\n[HttpPost]\n[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\npublic IActionResult Save(Entity entity)\n{\n    if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n    {\n        ViewBag.ForeignKeyOptions = new SelectList(\n            _context.RelatedEntities, \"Id\", \"Name\");\n        return View(\"Edit\", entity);\n    }\n\n    if (entity.Id == 0)\n    {\n        _context.Entities.Add(entity);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        _context.Entry(entity).State = EntityState.Modified;\n    }\n\n    _context.SaveChanges();\n    return RedirectToAction(\"Index\");\n}\n```\n\n## Form Best Practices\n\n1. **Structure**: \n   - Group related fields\n   - Use 2-3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile\n   - Clear section headers\n\n2. **Validation**:\n   - Show errors inline\n   - Display validation summary\n   - Client-side validation\n\n3. **User Experience**:\n   - Smart tab order\n   - Helpful placeholders\n   - Clear button labels\n   - Confirmation for destructive actions\n\n4. **Accessibility**:\n   - Proper labels for all inputs\n   - ARIA attributes where needed\n   - Keyboard navigation support\n\n## Workflow\n\n1. User requests: \"Create edit form for X\"\n2. Determine which properties are editable\n3. Create the view with proper form elements\n4. Set up dropdown options in controller\n5. Add validation error handling\n6. Implement Save controller action\n7. Test form submission and validation\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET\\.github\\agents\\EditForm_Skill.md"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01QUumtsjwa5ve7W7evz6wF2__vscode-1778089613418","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}

Entity Framework (EF) Configuration\n\n### 1.1 Model Annotations\nAll model classes in `OdrzavanjeVozila/Klase/` have been updated with proper EF annotations:\n\n**Files modified:**\n- `Korisnik.cs`\n- `Automobil.cs`\n- `Radionica.cs`\n- `Mehanicar.cs`\n- `ServisniNalog.cs`\n- `NalogStavka.cs`\n- `Dio.cs`\n\n**Changes made:**\n- Added `[Key]` attribute to all primary key properties (Id)\n- Added `[ForeignKey]` attributes to foreign key navigation properties\n- Changed collections from `List<T>` to `virtual ICollection<T>`\n- Made all navigation properties `virtual` for EF lazy loading\n- Added proper `using` statements for `System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations`\n\n### 1.2 DbContext Class\nCreated `OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext.cs` with:\n- `DbSet<T>` properties for all 7 entities\n- Relationship configuration in `OnModelCreating()`\n- Delete behavior rules:\n  - **Cascade**: Korisnik GåÆ Automobil, Automobil GåÆ ServisniNalog, ServisniNalog GåÆ NalogStavka\n  - **Restrict**: Radionica GåÆ Mehanicar, Dio GåÆ NalogStavka (prevents orphaned records)\n- Initial seed data for testing:\n  - 2 Radionice\n  - 2 Korisnici\n  - 3 Mehanicari\n  - 2 Automobili\n  - 2 Dijelovi\n\n### 1.3 Dependency Injection\nUpdated `Program.cs` to:\n- Register `OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext` with SQL Server\n- Configuration via `builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString()`\n- Schema kept for seed data management\n\n### 1.4 Connection String\nAdded to `appsettings.json`:\n```json\n\"ConnectionStrings\": {\n    \"OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext\": \"Server=(localdb)\\\\mssqllocaldb;Database=OdrzavanjeVozila;Trusted_Connection=true;\"\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 2. Custom Routing Implementation\n\n### 2.1 Custom Routes Added (4 routes)\nUpdated `Program.cs` with four semantic custom routes:\n\n| # | Route Pattern | Controller | Action | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | `/vozila/korisnika/{korisnikId:int}` | Automobil | PoBenzinskoj | Get user's vehicles |\n| 2 | `/servisi/status/{status}` | ServisniNalog | PriStatusu | Filter services by status |\n| 3 | `/dijelovi/kategorija/{kategorija}` | Dio | PrioCategory | Filter parts by category |\n| 4 | `/mehanicari/radionica/{radionicaId:int}` | Mehanicar | PorRadionica | Get workshop's mechanics |\n\n### 2.2 Route Evaluation Order\n1. **Attribute Routes** (if implemented on actions)\n2. **Custom Routes** (in order listed above)\n3. **Default Route** (`{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}`)\n\n---\n\n## 3. Documentation\n\n### 3.1 semantic-model.md\nComprehensive database model documentation:\n- **7 Entities documented:**\n  - Korisnik (Users)\n  - Automobil (Vehicles)\n  - Radionica (Workshops)\n  - Mehanicar (Mechanics)\n  - ServisniNalog (Service Orders)\n  - NalogStavka (Service Order Items)\n  - Dio (Parts)\n\n- **For each entity:**\n  - Primary key\n  - Foreign keys\n  - All properties with types\n  - Relationships (1-N, N-1)\n  - Enumerations used\n\n- **Relationship diagram** showing complete data model\n\n### 3.2 sitemap.md\nComplete routing documentation:\n- All **default routes** (standard {controller/action/id})\n- All **custom routes** with examples\n- **Attribute routing** pattern examples\n- **Route evaluation order**\n- Navigation patterns for each controller\n\n---\n\n## 4. Skills Configuration\n\nCreated three reusable AI skills in `.github/agents/`:\n\n### 4.1 EF_Skill.md\nFor Entity Framework tasks:\n- Adding new model classes with annotations\n- Configuring DbContext and relationships\n- Generating migrations\n- Updating the database\n- Data seeding\n\n### 4.2 ListPage_Skill.md\nFor creating list/index pages:\n- Building responsive table views\n- Adding filter/search UI\n- Implementing action buttons (Edit, Delete, Details)\n- Using Bootstrap 5 styling\n- Pagination support\n\n### 4.3 EditForm_Skill.md\nFor creating edit/create forms:\n- Building form pages with validation\n- Handling foreign key dropdowns\n- Client-side and server-side validation\n- Responsive form design\n- Form submission patterns\n\n---\n\n## 5. Next Steps (Not Done Yet)\n\nTo complete full EF integration:\n\n### 5.1 Generate Initial Migration\n```powershell\ndotnet ef migrations add Initial --startup-project OdrzavanjeVozila --context OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext\n```\n\n### 5.2 Apply Migration to Database\n```powershell\ndotnet ef database update --startup-project OdrzavanjeVozila --context OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext\n```\n\n### 5.3 Update Controllers\nReplace mock repositories with EF repository implementations:\n- Create `IRepository<T>` interface\n- Implement EF-based repositories\n- Update dependency injection in `Program.cs`\n\n### 5.4 Implement Custom Route Actions\nAdd controller actions for the 4 custom routes:\n```csharp\n// AutomobilController\npublic IActionResult PoBenzinskoj(int korisnikId) { ... }\n\n// ServisniNalogController\npublic IActionResult PriStatusu(string status) { ... }\n\n// DioController\npublic IActionResult PrioCategory(string kategorija) { ... }\n\n// MehanicarController\npublic IActionResult PorRadionica(int radionicaId) { ... }\n```\n\n### 5.5 Create Views for Custom Routes\nCreate views that display filtered data accordingly\n\n### 5.6 Implement CRUD Operations\n- Create Edit/Create actions and views (use EditForm_Skill)\n- Create Delete functionality\n- Create proper form validation\n\n---\n\n## 6. {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T19:53:52.681Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\214701b2b6b091fa24228c5c59ce5c4c\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\68826ff3-03b9-43b7-94de-7e12556000ef.jsonl","tool_name":"memory","tool_input":{"command":"create","path":"/memories/repo/Lab3_EF_Routing_Implementation.md","file_text":"# Lab 3 - EF & Routing Implementation\n\n## Completed Tasks\n\n### 1. EF Configuration G£à\n- Added `[Key]` to all primary keys\n- Added `[ForeignKey]` to all foreign key properties\n- Changed `List<T>` to `virtual ICollection<T>`\n- Made navigation properties `virtual`\n\n### 2. DbContext G£à\n- Created `OdrzavanjeVozilaDbContext.cs`\n- 7 DbSet properties for all entities\n- Relationship configuration in OnModelCreating\n- Delete behaviors (Cascade/Restrict)\n- Initial seed data\n\n### 3. DI Registration G£à\n- Registered DbContext in Program.cs\n- Connection string in appsettings.json\n- SQL Server (localdb) configuration\n\n### 4. Custom Routing (4 routes) G£à\n1. `/vozila/korisnika/{korisnikId:int}` GåÆ Automobil.PoBenzinskoj\n2. `/servisi/status/{status}` GåÆ ServisniNalog.PriStatusu\n3. `/dijelovi/kategorija/{kategorija}` GåÆ Dio.PrioCategory\n4. `/mehanicari/radionica/{radionicaId:int}` GåÆ Mehanicar.PorRadionica\n\n### 5. Skills Created G£à\n- `EF_Skill.md` - For EF tasks\n- `ListPage_Skill.md` - For list page creation\n- `EditForm_Skill.md` - For form creation\n\n## Entities & Relationships\n\n| Entity | PK | FKs | Collections |\n|--------|----|----|-------------|\n| Korisnik | Id | - | Vozila |\n| Automobil | Id | KorisnikId | ServisniNalozi |\n| Radionica | Id | - | Mehanicari |\n| Mehanicar | Id | RadionicaId | Nalozi |\n| ServisniNalog | Id | AutomobilId, MehanicarId | Stavke |\n| NalogStavka | Id | NalogId, DioId | - |\n| Dio | Id | - | Stavke |\n\n## Next Steps\n- Generate initial migration\n- Apply migration to database\n- Implement custom route action methods\n- Replace mock repositories with EF repositories\n- Create/Edit views using existing skills\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01SQEmeQrYwX9Q3KApjau6j6__vscode-1778089613421","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Dominik\\Documents\\GitHub\\.NET"}
